message:
feat(tui): validate reduced-motion toggle with semantic transitions (br-1xt0m.1.5.2)

Add tests confirming reduced-motion toggle: cancels in-flight semantic
transitions, persists to envfile, and skips both lateral and cross-category
transition kinds. The feature was already fully implemented; this bead
validates the contract with the new semantic transition system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
